title: Marchantia Cryopreservation of Gemmae
author: Marius Rebmann
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9vxh67n

steps.title: Collect fresh gemmae and plate on...
steps.instruction: Collect fresh gemmae and plate on preculture plates , incubate 1-3 days under normal growth conditions (e.g. 21°C constant light)

steps.title: Place small drops (approx
steps.instruction: Place small drops (approx. 40μL) of alginate solution on an empty 4.5cm petridish/multi-well plate to form beads.

steps.title: Use forceps to transfer gemmae from...
steps.instruction: Use forceps to transfer gemmae from preculture plates, place 1-5 gemmae inside each bead. Proceed quickly to step 4 to avoid gemmae sinking to the bottom or edge of the bead.

steps.title: Add a drop of CaCl 2...
steps.instruction: Add a drop of CaCl 2 solution to each bead, make sure to not displace gemmae from the bead.

steps.title: Use a serological pipette to fill...
steps.instruction: Use a serological pipette to fill the plate with loading solution , submerging the beads. Saok beads for 30min.

steps.title: Use a serological pipette to remove...
steps.instruction: Use a serological pipette to remove the loading solution without disrupting the beads.

steps.title: Remove lid and air dry beads in flowhood for >2h
steps.instruction: Remove lid and air dry beads in flowhood for >2h.

steps.title: Use forceps or scalpels to transfer beads into 1
steps.instruction: Use forceps or scalpels to transfer beads into 1.5mL Eppendorf tubes (max. 10 beads/tube).

steps.title: Flash freeze tubes in liquid nitrogen for >2 minutes
steps.instruction: Flash freeze tubes in liquid nitrogen for >2 minutes.

steps.title: Move tubes to -80°C for long term storage
steps.instruction: Move tubes to -80°C for long term storage.

steps.title: Remove tubes from freezer and immediately...
steps.instruction: Remove tubes from freezer and immediately place in a 37ºC water bath or heat block for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5mL thawing solution to each tube, incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Replace thawing solution with rinse solution
steps.instruction: Replace thawing solution with rinse solution . Incubate at room temperature for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Remove rinse solution, transfer beads on...
steps.instruction: Remove rinse solution, transfer beads on 1/2 Gamborg plates, incubate under normal growth conditions (e.g. 21°C constant light) until thalli grow
